From Srebrzynska, Nika <N.Srebrzynska@napier.ac.uk> on behalf of Student Accommodation <accommodation@napier.ac.uk>

findings.text: Both NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041 contain identical email text: meeting confirmation from Nika Srebrzynska to Anfal Elbushra, 08/04/2026, 1pm Friday 10th April at Bainfield Reception.
Extracted text SHA-256 hashes are identical (8c818599...), confirming the textual content of both sources is exactly the same.
Source file SHA-256 hashes differ (b2a586fd vs 1e4855d6), indicating separate file copies despite identical content.
NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041 are duplicate sources. Recommend retaining one (e.g., NAP-SRC-0011) and marking the other as duplicate in the file inventory.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Deduplication Report: NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041

**Task:** bundle-09-dedup-check
**Date:** 2026-04-29

### Summary
Both sources are confirmed duplicates of the same meeting confirmation email.

### Evidence
- Identical extracted text (SHA-256: 8c8185998bc10ffa5129fa940ee73a7f153b2d0037d5a6c5fe46308b459ca176)
- Same sender, recipient, date, subject, and body
- Different file-level SHA-256 hashes (b2a586fd vs 1e4855d6) indicating separate file copies

### Recommendation
1. Retain NAP-SRC-0011 as the canonical source.
2. Mark NAP-SRC-0041 as a duplicate in the file inventory.
3. Update any references to NAP-SRC-0041 to point to NAP-SRC-0011.
4. Verify chain-of-custody records for both files to determine origin of duplication.
proposed_artifacts.title: Deduplication Report for NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041

proposed_tasks.instructions: Review file inventory and import logs for NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041 to determine how two separate file copies with identical content were ingested. Check for accidental re-import, different email attachments, or versioning errors. Update chain-of-custody records accordingly.
proposed_tasks.title: Investigate origin of duplicate source files

risk_flags.text: Duplicate sources may cause double-counting in evidence weight or confuse chain-of-custody tracking if not resolved.

summary: NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041 are confirmed duplicates. Both are PDFs of the same meeting confirmation email from Nika Srebrzynska to Anfal Elbushra, dated 08/04/2026, with identical extracted text (SHA-256: 8c818599...). The source files differ in SHA-256 (b2a586fd vs 1e4855d6) and file paths, indicating separate file copies. Recommend deduplication: retain one source, mark the other as duplicate, and update the file inventory.

uncertainties.text: Reason for duplicate file copies is unknown: could be accidental re-import, different email attachments, or versioning error.
